name: escapes-disable-markdown-constructs
markdown:
\*not emphasized* \
not a tag \[not a link](/foo) \`not code` 1\. not a list \* not a list \# not a heading \[foo]: /url "not a reference" \ö not a character entity
html: *not emphasized* <br/> not a tag [not a link](/foo) `not code` 1. not a list * not a list # not a heading [foo]: /url "not a reference" ö not a character entity

### foo
#### foo

###### foo

end

name: pre-code-block-preserved-then-paragraph
markdown:
import Text.HTML.TagSoup

main :: IO ()
main = print $ parseTags tags
okay
html:
import Text.HTML.TagSoup

main :: IO ()
main = print $ parseTags tags

okay

name: script-block-preserved-then-paragraph
markdown:
<script type="text/javascript">
// JavaScript example

document.getElementById("demo").innerHTML = "Hello JavaScript!";
</script>
okay

name: cdata-block-then-paragraph
markdown:
<![CDATA[
function matchwo(a,b)
{
  if (a < b && a < 0) then {
    return 1;

  } else {

    return 0;
  }
}
]]>
okay
html: okay

name: tilde-run-lengths-and-mismatches
markdown:
These are ~not strikethroughs.

No, they are not~

This ~is ~ legit~ isn't ~ legit.

This is not ~~~~~one~~~~~ huge strikethrough.

~one~ ~~two~~ ~~~three~~~

No ~mismatch~~
html:
These are ~not strikethroughs.

No, they are not~

This is ~ legit isn't ~ legit.

This is not ~~~~~one~~~~~ huge strikethrough.

one two ~~~three~~~

No ~mismatch~~

name: disallowed-tags-escaped-comments-and-others-allowed
markdown: This is not okay, but **this** <strong>is</strong>. <p>This is <xmp> not okay, but **this** <strong>is</strong>.</p> Nope, I won't have <textarea>. <p>No <textarea> here either.</p> <p>This <random /> <thing> is okay</thing> though.</p> Yep, <totally>okay</totally>. <!-- HTML comments are okay, though. --> <!- But we're strict. -> <! No nonsense. > <!-- Leave multiline comments the heck alone, though, okay? Even with {"x":"y"} or 1 > 2 or whatever. Even **markdown**. --> <!--- Support everything CommonMark's parser does. --> <!----> <!--thistoo-->
html:
This is <xmp> not okay, but this is.

This is <xmp> not okay, but **this** is.

Nope, I won't have <textarea>.

No <textarea> here either.

This is okay though.

Yep, okay.

<!- But we're strict. -> <! No nonsense. >

name: footnote-definitions-with-block-content
markdown:
This is some text![^1]. Other text.[^footnote].

Here's a thing[^other-note].

And another thing[^codeblock-note].

This doesn't have a referent[^nope].


[^other-note]:       no code block here (spaces are stripped away)

[^codeblock-note]:
        this is now a code block (8 spaces indentation)

[^1]: Some *bolded* footnote definition.

Hi!

[^footnote]:
    > Blockquotes can be in a footnote.

        as well as code blocks

    or, naturally, simple paragraphs.

[^unused]: This is unused.
html:
This is some text!1. Other text.2.

Here's a thing3.

And another thing4.

This doesn't have a referent[^nope].

Hi!

  1. Some bolded footnote definition. ↩

  2. Blockquotes can be in a footnote.

    as well as code blocks

    or, naturally, simple paragraphs. ↩

  3. no code block here (spaces are stripped away) ↩

  4. this is now a code block (8 spaces indentation)
    ↩

name: footnote-referenced-multiple-times-backrefs
markdown:
This is some text. It has a footnote[^a-footnote].

This footnote is referenced[^a-footnote] multiple times, in lots of different places.[^a-footnote]

[^a-footnote]: This footnote definition should have three backrefs.
html:
This is some text. It has a footnote1.

This footnote is referenced1 multiple times, in lots of different places.1

  1. This footnote definition should have three backrefs. ↩ ↩2 ↩3

name: footnote-identifier-html-escaped
html:
Hello1

  1. pwned ↩

name: note-alert
markdown:
> [!NOTE]
> Useful information that users should know, even when skimming content.
html:
Note

Useful information that users should know, even when skimming content.

name: tip-alert
markdown:
> [!TIP]
> Helpful advice for doing things better or more easily.
html:
Tip

Helpful advice for doing things better or more easily.

name: important-alert
markdown:
> [!IMPORTANT]
> Key information users need to know to achieve their goal.
html:
Important

Key information users need to know to achieve their goal.

name: warning-alert
markdown:
> [!WARNING]
> Urgent info that needs immediate user attention to avoid problems.
html:
Warning

Urgent info that needs immediate user attention to avoid problems.

name: caution-alert
markdown:
> [!CAUTION]
> Advises about risks or negative outcomes of certain actions.
html:
Caution

Advises about risks or negative outcomes of certain actions.

name: inline-math-dollar-delimiters
markdown: This sentence uses `$` delimiters to show math inline: $\sqrt{3x-1}+(1+x)^2$
html: This sentence uses $ delimiters to show math inline: \sqrt{3x-1}+(1+x)^2
